headline: Clorox to Report Q3 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
summary: CLX heads into Q3 earnings with rising costs, soft demand and margin pressure, even as its IGNITE strategy and cost savings initiatives aim to stabilize performance.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Clorox, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Dara Mohsenian   maintains Clorox (NYSE:CLX) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $136 to $110.
